controls.control_objective: To ensure invariably report all transactions through iccoms on the same day by 9 pm by uploading data through the secured website (sws) to their respective link
controls.control_description: 1.2.1 The currency chests should invariably report all transactions through ICCOMS on the same day by 9 PM by uploading data through the Secured Website (SWS) to their respective link offices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to invariably report all transactions through iccoms on the same day by 9 pm by uploading data through the secured website (sws) to their respective link

controls.control_objective: To ensure invariably report the consolidated position to the issue offices latest by 11 pm on the same day
controls.control_description: Link offices should invariably report the consolidated position to the Issue Offices latest by 11 PM on the same day.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to invariably report the consolidated position to the issue offices latest by 11 pm on the same day

controls.control_objective: To ensure report all transactions directly to the issue office of the reserve bank by 11 pm on the same day
controls.control_description: 1.2.2 The Sub-Treasury Offices (STOs) should report all transactions directly to the Issue Office of the Reserve Bank by 11 PM on the same day.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report all transactions directly to the issue office of the reserve bank by 11 pm on the same day

controls.control_objective: To ensure at its discretion grant appropriate grace period in the matter of levy of penal interest
controls.control_description: However, Reserve Bank may at its discretion grant appropriate grace period in the matter of levy of penal interest.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to at its discretion grant appropriate grace period in the matter of levy of penal interest

controls.control_objective: To ensure be taken to ensure that remittances of fresh notes/notes to the currency chests are not reported as 'deposit' transactions in the link office statemen
controls.control_description:
Particular care should be taken to ensure that remittances of
fresh notes/notes to the currency chests are not reported as 'deposit' transactions in the Link Office Statements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be taken to ensure that remittances of fresh notes/notes to the currency chests are not reported as 'deposit' transactions in the link office statemen

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown as withdrawal by chest/s / link offices
controls.control_description:
1.5 Reporting of Soiled note remittances to RBI / diversion to other chests
Soiled note remittances to RBI /diversion to other currency chest/s should not be shown as withdrawal by chest/s / link offices.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown as withdrawal by chest/s / link offices

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported in the column "2a and 4 a" i
controls.control_description:
1.6 Reporting of diversions in ICCOMS
As regards reporting of diversion/s in ICCOMS, they must be reported in the column "2A and 4 A" i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported in the column "2a and 4 a" i

controls.control_objective: To ensure report under 2 a and the remitting chest should report the amount under 4a in the chest slip without any delay
controls.control_description: the chest receiving the diversion should report under 2 A and the remitting chest should report the amount under 4A in the chest slip without any delay.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to report under 2 a and the remitting chest should report the amount under 4a in the chest slip without any delay

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reported under "withdrawal" and "deposit" columns i
controls.control_description: Diversion amounts, even to the chest of the same bank should not be reported under "Withdrawal" and "Deposit" columns i.e.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reported under "withdrawal" and "deposit" columns i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be levied at the rate of 2% over the prevailing bank rate for the period of delayed reporting/wrong reporting/non-reporting /inclusion of ineligible a
controls.control_description:
Rate of penal interest
Penal interest shall be levied at the rate of 2% over the prevailing Bank Rate for the period of delayed reporting/wrong reporting/non-reporting /inclusion of ineligible amounts in chest balances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be levied at the rate of 2% over the prevailing bank rate for the period of delayed reporting/wrong reporting/non-reporting /inclusion of ineligible a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to currency chests at treasury/sub-treasury offices also
controls.control_description:
Levy of penal interest in respect of currency chests at treasuries
The above instructions shall be applicable to currency chests at treasury/sub-treasury offices also.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to currency chests at treasury/sub-treasury offices also

controls.control_objective: To ensure ordinarily be no occasion for banks to request for reconsideration of the reserve bank's decision in individual cases
controls.control_description: 5.1 As the sole criterion for levy of penal interest for delayed reporting is the number of days of delay, there should ordinarily be no occasion for banks to request for reconsideration of the Reserve Bank's decision in individual cases.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ordinarily be no occasion for banks to request for reconsideration of the reserve bank's decision in individual cases

controls.control_objective: To ensure be made to the issue office concerned through the head / controlling office of the bank concerned within a month from the date of debit of the bank co
controls.control_description: However, representations, if any, on account of genuine difficulties faced by chests especially in hilly/remote areas and those affected by natural calamities, etc., may be made to the Issue Office concerned through the Head / Controlling office of the bank concerned within a month from the date of debit of the bank concerned.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be made to the issue office concerned through the head / controlling office of the bank concerned within a month from the date of debit of the bank co
